title: adhatoda oreophila
intro: Adhatoda oreophila, also known as the hill leaf, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Adhatoda oreophila include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower fever and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Adhatoda oreophila include teas, infusions, and decoctions made from its leaves, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
